inputs.topic: Summer sale for SaaS analytics platform

rubric: Must generate at least 3 distinct subject lines referencing the topic
Subject lines should be varied in style (urgency, curiosity, value)
Meta descriptions under 160 chars each, containing target keywords

inputs.offer: Free trial of project management tool

rubric: 3 ad variations with headline, body, CTA. Must reference the offer

inputs.target: VP Engineering at Series B startups

rubric: Professional cold email with subject, body, soft CTA

inputs.responsibilities: Built payment processing pipeline, led team of 5, reduced latency by 40%

rubric: Resume bullets with quantified impact, action verbs, technical depth

inputs.topic: How to Build a SaaS MVP in 30 Days

rubric: Structured outline with H2 sections, bullet points per section

inputs.idea: Why most startups fail at hiring their first engineer

rubric: 5-tweet thread with hook, value tweets, and CTA

inputs.prd: Build a user notification system with email, push, and in-app channels. Must support preferences and quiet hours.

rubric: Epics with tickets, story points, acceptance criteria

inputs.notes: John to finalize API spec by Friday. Sarah will set up staging. Need budget approval from Mike by EOD Tuesday. Design review moved to Thursday.

rubric: Action items with assignees and deadlines, plus follow-up email draft

inputs.code: const debounce = (fn, ms) => { let t; return (...a) => { clearTimeout(t); t = setTimeout(() => fn(...a), ms); }; }

rubric: Clear explanation of debounce pattern with line-by-line breakdown

inputs.query: Find users who signed up last month and made at least 3 purchases

rubric: Valid SQL query with explanation of clauses
